summary.business_type: Local Legal Service (multi-branch: Tehran, Ahvaz, Andimeshk)
top_findings: 8,924 thin single-article law pages (97.7% of sitemap) are indexable and burn crawl budget
Duplicate content between single-article pages and parent law pages
robots.txt blocks /_next/ which prevents Googlebot from fetching CSS/JS
Images still use raw (no next/image), no WebP/srcset/lazy on most
English homepage /en missing from sitemap; public HTML has Cache-Control: no-store
quick_wins: Remove/limit single-article law pages from sitemap
Fix double brand suffix in home & service titles
Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to law pages
verified_fixes: 8,135 duplicate law-article titles fixed (unique title with law name)
H1 on article pages now includes law name
Meta descriptions now unique per article
Flat-structure laws now display their articles
Prev/next + related experts/rulings internal links added

findings.title: robots.txt blocks /_next/
findings.description: Disallow: /_next/ prevents crawlers fetching hashed CSS/JS under /_next/static, risking unstyled rendering for Googlebot/AI.

findings.title: Crawl budget on thin pages
findings.description: 8,924 of 9,134 sitemap URLs (97.7%) are single-article law pages.
findings.recommendation: Drop lawArticleEntries from src/app/sitemap.ts; keep parent law pages.

findings.title: /en homepage missing from sitemap
findings.description: hasCompleteEnglish("") returns false though /en is live and indexable.
findings.recommendation: Mark home as complete-English or add /en home explicitly.

findings.title: No caching on public HTML
findings.description: Cache-Control: private, no-cache, no-store on every public page; each hit reaches the low-RAM Next.js server.
findings.recommendation: Add s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate for public routes.

findings.title: Single monolithic sitemap
findings.description: 9,134 URLs in one file, no sitemap index.

findings.title: Duplicate HSTS header
findings.description: HSTS set in both next.config.mjs and nginx.

findings.title: X-Powered-By exposed
findings.description: Next.js version leaked.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Unique article titles with law name (title.absolute)

findings.title: Brand name duplicated in <title>
findings.description: Layout template appends brand to titles that already contain it (home, services: '... | دادپروران مهر ایران | دادپروران مهر ایران').
findings.recommendation: Author page titles without brand suffix; let template add it once.

findings.title: Titles over 60 chars
findings.description: Service 76, EN home 96 chars, partly from double brand.

findings.title: Duplicate content article vs law page
findings.description: Parent law page contains full text of all articles; single pages are subsets.
findings.recommendation: noindex,follow single pages OR enrich with commentary.

findings.title: Excessive outgoing links on law pages
findings.description: Constitution page ~207 links; larger laws far more, diluting link equity.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Service & article pages have good depth (400+ words)

findings.title: Thin content at scale
findings.description: ~8,900 single-article pages median ~190 words, indexable, no commentary.

findings.title: Few published articles
findings.description: Only ~11 articles; weak topical authority.
findings.recommendation: Build hub-and-spoke content clusters per service.

findings.title: Thin lawyer pages (E-E-A-T)
findings.description: ~280 words; insufficient for YMYL legal niche.
findings.recommendation: Add credentials, notable cases, bar license, education.

findings.title: Law/article pages lack dedicated schema
findings.description: ~9,000 pages have only global LegalService blocks; no BreadcrumbList/Legislation.

findings.title: LegalService repeated 4x per page
findings.description: 1 main + 3 branches as independent LegalService entities on every page, muddying entity consolidation and inflating HTML.

findings.title: Calculators lack schema
findings.description: No WebApplication/HowTo.

findings.title: Raw JPGs remain
findings.description: c2a44717.jpg (144KB) and 092740d9.jpg (80KB) served raw at small display size.

findings.title: Heavy HTML (173KB)
findings.description: Inflated by duplicated LegalService JSON-LD + RSC payload.

findings.title: Large JS bundle (~500KB)
findings.description: Main chunk 169KB + polyfills 110KB.

findings.title: No edge/CDN caching
findings.description: no-store on public pages amplifies load on low-RAM server.

findings.title: Thin content limits citability
findings.description: 190-word article pages lack self-contained context AI engines cite.

findings.title: /_next/ block harms AI rendering
findings.description: Blocked assets affect AI crawlers too.

findings.title: No /llms-full.txt
findings.description: Large legal corpus would benefit from a full version.

categories.name: Images
what_works: Two hero images converted to WebP

findings.title: next/image not used
findings.description: ~19 files use raw ; no automatic WebP/AVIF, srcset, or lazy loading.

findings.title: Uploads stored raw
findings.description: Panel uploads still save original files.

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact
items: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to law pages
